title: AIT: Remixed CLIENT MODS
description: This has a ton of client side mods that enhances the ait server / Minecraft experience.
body:
This pack includes 90 + mods (mainly QOL mods. ALL client side mods, but still work on servers).

Please use with the ait-remixed modpack if you want too use these on the server! (just drop this packs `mods` folder into that packs `mods` folder)

-------------

Q&A!

### When will this be updated? - When I feel like it! ### Where is the forge version? - The public server is only fabric and so is this pack. ### Curseforge? Nope, i barley play on the server anymore and i don't want to update it on 2 sites! ### Can you add .... mod? - Nope these mods are here because i like using them on the server to better my experiance, if a mod is removed its because i dont want to use it anymore or if a new one is added its because i think its a cool mod. ### Can i use this on my server? - Yeh feel free. But please credit my pack! -------------

Credits

- Check out AmbleLabs [HERE](https://modrinth.com/organization/amble-labs) - Check out the full modlist (on the version page under the 'Dependencies' section!)
